query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS, ROUND((DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2) AS size_mb FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY (DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS, ROUND((DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2) AS size_mb FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY (DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) DESC LIMIT 15;
